sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Invesco SteelPath MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0900
feed.summary: The Invesco SteelPath MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0900 per share. This declaration provides investors with a consistent income stream from its holdings in MLP and energy infrastructure assets.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Boosts Stock Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 31.9% in Q4, acquiring an additional 4,257 shares to own a total of 17,617 shares valued at approximately $3.01 million. The article highlights Qualcomm's recent financial actions, including a $20 billion share repurchase authorization and an increased quarterly dividend of $0.92 per share, yielding about 2.7%. Despite beating earnings and revenue estimates in its latest quarter, the company faces mixed analyst sentiment, with an average "Hold" rating and concerns about handset demand.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Ohio Bills Could Rise Up To $5 A Month As May 22 Rate Filing Nears
feed.summary: FirstEnergy's Ohio utilities are preparing to file a three-year rate plan by May 22, which could increase monthly bills for average residential customers by $4 to $5. This proposal is a significant test for Ohio's new forward-looking ratemaking law, allowing utilities to price future grid investments. The plan aims to fund approximately $800 million annually for infrastructure upgrades and tree trimming, and comes amid recent storm-cost adjustments and regulatory penalties for FirstEnergy.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Stock Rises on Earnings. It Shook Off a ‘Challenging’ Backdrop.
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's stock rose on Friday following the announcement of better-than-expected quarterly earnings. The consumer packaged goods company demonstrated resilience despite a challenging economic environment, leading to a positive market reaction.

feed.title: Picard Medical revenue up 79.9% to USD 1.1M in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Picard Medical, Inc. announced preliminary, unaudited top-line revenues of $1.1 million for Q1 2026, marking a 79.9% increase from the previous year. This growth was attributed to higher utilization of the SynCardia Total Artificial Heart and increased driver rental income, driven by favorable reimbursement and economic conditions in the United States, along with pricing adjustments to their rental program. The company expects to file its full financial results by May 15, 2026.

feed.title: Ponce Financial grows loans and deposits as Q1 profit hits $8.6M
feed.summary: Ponce Financial Group reported a Q1 2026 net income of $8.6 million, with diluted EPS of $0.36, driven by a 27.13% year-over-year increase in net interest income to $28.2 million and a net interest margin of 3.61%. The company saw significant balance sheet growth, with net loans rising 3.82% quarter-over-quarter to $2.70 billion and deposits increasing 4.26% to $2.13 billion, while non-performing assets decreased. Despite a quarter-over-quarter dip in net income due to lower non-interest income and higher credit provisions, Ponce Financial maintained strong capital ratios and continued its positive historical earnings trend.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Posts Solid Q1 Results, Reaffirms 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported solid first-quarter 2026 results with modest revenue and profit growth despite softer volumes, reaffirming its full-year 2026 guidance. The company saw revenue rise 4.3% to $19.1 billion, and net income increased to $1.62 billion, driven by improved pricing and mix. HCA generated robust cash flow, supporting significant capital expenditures, share buybacks, and a higher dividend, while an AI analyst from TipRanks rated the stock as "Outperform."

feed.title: HCA HEALTHCARE ($HCA) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: HCA HEALTHCARE ($HCA) announced its Q1 2026 earnings, reporting $7.15 per share and revenues of $19.109 billion, both missing analyst estimates. The article also details recent insider trading activity, showing significant sales by executives, as well as institutional investor movements in HCA stock. Analyst ratings and price targets are also provided, with a majority of firms issuing "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings.

feed.title: Aetna says 95% of eligible care approvals clear within 24 hours
feed.summary: Aetna announced significant progress in simplifying its prior authorization process, with 88% of volume standardized and over 95% of eligible requests approved within 24 hours. The company also reported processing 83% of prior authorizations in real-time and eliminating over 1 million provider calls through automation. Aetna is integrating medical and pharmacy decisions into single reviews and launching bundled programs to streamline approvals further.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Purchases 1,374 Shares of Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 30.9% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 1,374 shares to reach a total of 5,819 shares valued at approximately $3.33 million. This increase occurred despite recent insider selling by executives like Rodney Michael Shurman and Bob De Lange, totaling around $88.6 million in the last 90 days. Caterpillar reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share, with analysts maintaining a mostly bullish outlook.

feed.title: SLB Profit Falls as Iran War Disrupts Operations, Clouds Outlook
feed.summary: SLB's first-quarter profit has decreased due to widespread disruptions in the Middle East, which CEO Olivier Le Peuch described as a challenging start to the year. The oilfield-services company had to demobilize operations in several countries to ensure the safety of personnel and facilities.

feed.title: Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) plans 2026 virtual AGM and new equity incentive plan
feed.summary: Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) is preparing for its 2026 annual general meeting (AGM) on June 4, 2026, which will be held virtually. Shareholders will vote on key proposals including setting the Board size at nine directors, electing nine incumbent nominees, approving the 2026 Equity Incentive Plan, and ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as independent auditors. The new equity plan maintains the existing 8,280,530-share reserve, and the company highlights its strong governance and ESG performance, including zero reportable spills and lost-time incidents in 2025.

feed.title: Roper Technologies (ROP) Margin Decline Tests Bullish AI Growth Narrative Heading Into Q1 2026
feed.summary: Roper Technologies reported Q1 2026 results with Q4 2025 revenue of US$2,058.6 million and EPS of US$4.00, but trailing net profit margins eased from 22% to 19.4%. This margin decline tests the bullish narrative centered on AI growth, with bears pointing to higher costs and integration risks. Despite this, the company's valuation still shows potential upside against analyst targets and DCF fair value.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Decreases Position in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. by 24.4% in the fourth quarter of the prior year, selling 6,749 shares and retaining 20,890 shares valued at approximately $3.21 million. Despite this reduction, institutional investors collectively own about 91.09% of TJX stock. The company reported strong Q4 results, beating estimates, issued positive FY-2027 EPS guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: SLB Stock Tumbles on Earnings as CEO Cites ‘Challenging Start to the Year’
feed.summary: SLB's stock fell after its CEO, Olivier Le Peuch, stated the company is facing a "challenging start to the year." This comes despite earlier claims that struggles in key regions were over, indicating that the oilfield services provider continues to face difficulties, particularly due to disruptions in the Middle East.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase adds Matthews to its growing list of Charlotte-area branches
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase is continuing its expansion in the Charlotte market by adding a new branch in Matthews. This new location contributes to the bank's rapid retail growth, which has established a significant local presence with approximately 28 operating branches and plans for at least 15 more by the end of 2027, just six years after entering the market.

feed.title: Travelers Tests AI Distribution With Simply Business Small Business App
feed.summary: Travelers Companies, through its subsidiary Simply Business, has launched an AI-powered insurance app on ChatGPT for small businesses in the US, aimed at streamlining the quoting process. This initiative represents Travelers' move into digital distribution in commercial lines and a strategic test of AI at the front of the customer acquisition funnel. While the commercial impact is yet TBD, it aligns with Travelers' focus on analytics, underwriting technology, and disciplined risk selection.

feed.title: Is CMS Energy (CMS) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Softness?
feed.summary: CMS Energy's stock has shown recent softness, declining 1.9% over the past 7 days, but returning 8.8% year-to-date and 6.5% over the last year. Simply Wall St's valuation checks score CMS Energy at 2 out of 6, with a Dividend Discount Model suggesting it's about 9.1% overvalued, and its P/E ratio aligns closely with its proprietary "Fair Ratio," indicating it's broadly fairly priced. The article encourages investors to use "Narratives" for personalized valuation analysis, linking assumptions to forecasts and fair value.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare (NYSE: HCA) Q1 2026 results, dividend and buybacks
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported a modest 4.3% revenue increase to $19.109 billion and a slight 0.6% rise in net income to $1.620 billion for Q1 2026. Diluted EPS grew 10.9% to $7.15 due to share repurchases. The company affirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, declared a quarterly dividend of $0.78 per share, and demonstrated strong cash generation ($2.014 billion from operations) with significant capital deployment in buybacks and expenditures.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (HCA) HCA Healthcare, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $19.11B, vs. FactSet Est of $19.09B
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. reported its Q1 revenue reached $19.11 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $19.09 billion. This news was published on April 24, 2026, at 07:10 AM EDT, indicating a positive financial performance for the company. The healthcare provider's revenue beat suggests strong demand for its medical care services.

feed.title: COCA-COLA CO : RBC gives a Buy rating
feed.summary: RBC has reiterated its "Buy" rating for The Coca-Cola Company (KO) with an unchanged target price of USD 87. This analyst recommendation suggests a positive outlook on the stock's future performance. The report highlights analyst Nik Modi's continued endorsement of the beverage giant.

feed.title: Paradice Investment Management LLC Has $28.73 Million Stake in Mohawk Industries, Inc. $MHK
feed.summary: Paradice Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) by 10.8% in the fourth quarter, now holding 262,872 shares valued at $28.73 million. Mohawk Industries recently reported Q4 EPS of $2.00, beating estimates, and set Q1 2026 guidance, though analysts have trimmed price targets. Insider selling has also occurred, with insiders owning 17.90% of the company.

feed.title: Cash Rich, Low Price – Gartner Stock to Break Out?
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) stock is highlighted as a compelling investment opportunity due to its strong fundamentals, including an impressive cash flow yield of 10.4% and recent revenue growth. Despite market downturns and associated risks, the stock is trading at a significant discount compared to its past highs, making it attractive for investors looking for cash-rich companies at a low price. The article suggests that Gartner could use its cash for further growth or shareholder returns, and recommends examining previous recovery patterns from dips.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD is Kerusso Capital Management LLC's 6th Largest Position

The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $157.35.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Boosts Stake in Devon Energy Corporation $DVN

Devon Energy is actively pursuing a merger with Coterra to expand its Permian Basin operations, fund higher dividends, and implement a multibillion-dollar buyback program, which analysts expect to boost shareholder returns.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Has $4.72 Million Stock Holdings in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP

(NASDAQ:PEP) during the fourth quarter, boosting its holdings by 25.6% to 32,852 shares valued at approximately $4.72 million. Analyst ratings for PepsiCo are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating, but the company's recent strategic AI partnership with Google Cloud, new product launches, and marketing campaigns have generated positive sentiment.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Increases Stake in Principal Financial Group, Inc. $PFG
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Principal Financial Group (NASDAQ:PFG) by 174.2% in the fourth quarter of an unspecified year, now owning 50,822 shares valued at $4.48 million. Principal Financial Group has also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.82, offering an annualized yield of 3.4%, and currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $93.44.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Grows Holdings in Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. $MAA
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas significantly increased its stake in Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) by 1,766.5% during the fourth quarter, now owning 286,189 shares valued at approximately $39.76 million. The article also notes recent insider selling activity and the company's dividend announcement.

feed.title: EQT (NYSE:EQT) Lowered to "Hold" Rating by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has downgraded EQT (NYSE:EQT) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating, also providing updated earnings estimates for 2026, 2027, and 2028. This comes amidst mixed analyst sentiments, with some reiterating "buy" or "outperform" ratings and price target increases, while others maintain "neutral" or express caution due to hedging losses and insider selling activities. EQT recently reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding consensus estimates, driven by increased revenue and record free cash flow.

feed.title: Ross Stores, Inc. $ROST is Kerusso Capital Management LLC's 3rd Largest Position
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Ross Stores, making it their 3rd largest holding. Ross Stores surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, leading to an increased quarterly dividend and numerous analyst target price hikes. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with a target price of $208.29.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Grows Stock Position in Allegion PLC $ALLE
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas increased its stake in Allegion PLC by 31.0% in the fourth quarter, now owning 201,845 shares valued at $32.14 million. Several other institutional investors also significantly grew their holdings in Allegion during the same period. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.55 per share and reported quarterly earnings that missed analyst estimates slightly, though revenue was up year-over-year.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare beats quarterly profit estimates on medical care services demand
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare surpassed Wall Street's first-quarter profit estimates due to strong demand for its medical care services, particularly non-urgent procedures from older Americans. Despite this, the company reported a decrease in respiratory-related admissions and emergency room visits compared to the previous year, suggesting a milder flu season impact. Following the announcement, HCA's shares experienced a 7.6% drop in premarket trading.

feed.title: How Ford is using A.I on the factory floor
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company is beginning to integrate artificial intelligence into its factory operations. Corey Williams, plant manager at the Dearborn truck plant, provided insights into some of these AI applications. This move marks a significant step for Ford in leveraging advanced technology on the factory floor.

feed.title: S&P Global to sell software unit to SLB, launch AI platform
feed.summary: S&P Global is selling its geoscience and petroleum engineering software portfolio, including Kingdom Software and Petra, to SLB. Concurrently, S&P Global Energy plans to launch Titan, an AI-powered upstream data platform. The transaction is expected to close in late 2026 or early 2027, with financial terms undisclosed.

feed.title: Peapod Lane Capital LLC Has $2.47 Million Position in OraSure Technologies, Inc. $OSUR
feed.summary: Peapod Lane Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in OraSure Technologies, making it their 17th-largest holding. Meanwhile, insider activity shows the CEO and CFO recently purchased shares, indicating confidence in the company. Despite this, OraSure Technologies is currently trading near $3.05 with a "Reduce" analyst consensus and a target price of $3.00, having reported negative EPS and margins last quarter.

feed.title: NiSource Announces New Data Center Agreement, Expands Contract with Amazon
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. has announced a new long-term energy agreement with Alphabet Inc. to support a large-scale data center in northern Indiana, leveraging its NIPSCO Generation LLC (GenCo) solution. Additionally, NiSource expanded its agreement with Amazon Data Services, Inc., accelerating site energization and associated credits for residential customers. The GenCo model is projected to deliver approximately $1.25 billion in aggregate cost savings for existing customers and an additional $17 million in contributions to local communities.

feed.title: The Tech Download: How Apple's new chief could shake things up
feed.summary: Apple announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO, with John Ternus, Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering, taking over in September. Cook will remain involved as executive chairman, focusing on policymaker engagement. This leadership change signals Apple's continued focus on its internal innovation, functional management, and integrated product strategy, particularly in hardware and AI.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) announced its financial and operating results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. Revenues increased by 4.3% to $19.109 billion, and diluted earnings per share increased by 10.9% to $7.15. The company reaffirmed its 2026 guidance and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.78 per share on common stock.

feed.title: CVX Q1'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 51.86B USD
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation (CVX) is scheduled to release its Q1'26 earnings on May 1st after market close, with results expected to be disclosed at 6:15 AM ET (10:15 AM UTC). The company's revenue estimate for Q1'26 is $51.86 billion, and the anticipated EPS is $0.97. This report will provide insights into Chevron's financial performance for the first quarter of 2026.

feed.title: D Q1'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 4.43B USD
feed.summary: Dominion Energy (D) is scheduled to release its Q1'26 earnings on May 1st, after market close, with disclosure expected at 7:30 AM ET (11:30 AM UTC). Analysts anticipate Q1'26 revenue of $4.43 billion and earnings per share (EPS) of $0.90. The article provides a table detailing historical and estimated revenue and EPS, along with surprise percentages.

feed.title: Teacher Retirement System of Texas Has $27.07 Million Stock Holdings in ConocoPhillips $COP
feed.summary: The Teacher Retirement System of Texas decreased its stake in ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) by 26.3% in Q4, now holding 289,206 shares valued at approximately $27.07 million. Company insiders have also been net sellers, with the CEO selling a significant portion of his shares. Despite missing Q4 earnings estimates, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for ConocoPhillips, with several raising their price targets.

feed.title: Eliquis heads to Cost Plus Drugs at $345 for 30 days on April 27
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb and Pfizer have partnered with Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drug Company to make Eliquis (apixaban) available on CostPlusDrugs.com starting April 27, 2026. This initiative aims to provide cash-paying patients with a more affordable and transparent way to access the oral blood thinner, which will cost $345 for a 30-day supply. Eliquis is widely prescribed to reduce the risk of stroke and blood clots in patients with atrial fibrillation and to treat deep vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism.
